text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I lost again?! How? I thought I would win for sure
this time!
choice_data_list: No need to panic. Let's take this slowly.
This is no time to be sad!
This is no time to be sad!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I lost again?! How? I thought I would win for sure
this time!
choice_data_list: No need to panic. Let's take this slowly.
This is no time to be sad!
This is no time to be sad!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Come on! Are you serious?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
If I just sit back and smell the roses, I'm gonna be
left in the dust!
choice_data_list:
There are some things you can only see when
you're calm.

There are some things you can only see when
you're calm.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hnngh!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Leave me alone! Just go away!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems my attempt at encouragement has the
reverse effect on Narita Taishin's mood, and she
kicks me out without a second thought.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I realize that telling her to calm down without
considering her feelings might have been rather
insensitive—so I wait for her, intending to
apologize.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What are you doing here?
choice_data_list:
I wanted to apologize for what I said in the
waiting room.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
You've been standing here this whole time just for
that?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ugh. I don't even know what to say. You're so...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Never mind. Anyway, now that I've calmed down
a bit...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
You were right. I was able to see what was wrong.
I still have a long ways to go.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, sure. What are we still standing here and
talking for, then?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Let's go to your office and figure out how to get
me first place!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She grins fiercely, eyes blazing, and I recognize it
as the flames of her determination to win.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Shut up! I'm not sad!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I'm just mad at myself for being so pathetic!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What are you on about?
choice_data_list: We can start the hard-core training tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Tomorrow?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
You're gonna put this off till tomorrow? We
should be starting right now!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
You want me to train hard-core? Bring it on. I'll
get super strong and grab first place next time!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She vows to make a comeback, and we begin our
days of hard-core training.
